emails.subject: Oglethorpe Power Corporation
emails.body: Oglethorpe Power Corporation I originally had the referenced counterparty opened for power. Are we sure it is not a FERC approved marketer?

emails.subject: Oglethorpe Power Corporation
emails.body: Oglethorpe Power Corporation I originally had the referenced counterparty opened for power. Are we sure it is not a FERC approved marketer?

emails.subject: Re: Oglethorpe Power Corporation
emails.body: Re: Oglethorpe Power Corporation According to all the FERC lists Leslie left me they are nowhere to be found. I have checked all 6 lists lists twice. Tana Jones 09/01/2000 08:56 AM

emails.subject: Re: Oglethorpe Power Corporation
emails.body: Re: Oglethorpe Power Corporation According to all the FERC lists Leslie left me they are nowhere to be found. I have checked all 6 lists lists twice. Tana Jones 09/01/2000 08:56 AM

emails.subject: Re: Oglethorpe Power Corporation
emails.body: Then, I'll stick with what I told the EOL team. If they really want to trade power they will have to get us a contact and we'll talk to them to see why they think they can trade power. Otherwise, it stays as a "no". Shari Stack 09/01/2000 09:09 AM
